title: pinus pumilio var. uliginosa
intro: Pinus pumilio var. uliginosa, also known as the alpine mountain pine, is a variety of pine tree that is native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of the western United States. The essential oil extracted from the needles of this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe respiratory issues and protect against infections. The health benefits of Pinus pumilio var. uliginosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments. Herbal preparations of Pinus pumilio var. uliginosa include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
